Save Next to Source Tip: Put the translated file in the same folder as the original (e.g. 1.mp4's subtitle lands next to 1.mp4). Desktop only — the web app keeps results under data/result.
AI Glossary Extraction Info: Extract terms with the LLM before translating
API Auth Error: API key is invalid or expired. Please check the API Key at the top of the Translate tab.
API Keys Exhausted: All API keys failed (invalid or out of quota). Please replace the key(s).
API Quota Error: Insufficient balance/quota. Please top up or switch to another key.
API key is required for online models.
Drop CSV file here: Drop CSV file here or click to browse
Drop files to upload: Drop files here, or click to upload
Err Insufficient Balance: Translation stopped: API balance/quota is insufficient. Top up or switch keys, then resume from History.
Err Invalid Key: Translation stopped: the API key is invalid or expired. Check the API Key, then resume from History.
Err Server: Translation stopped: the API server is unavailable. Try again later, then resume from History.
Err Api Generic: Translation stopped due to an API error. See the log for details; you can resume from History.
Uninstall Models Confirm: Also delete this plugin's downloaded models? Models still used by another plugin will be kept.
Log Max Files: Delete logs over N files (0 = off)
Log Max Days: Delete logs over N days (0 = off)
Log Max Size: Delete logs over N MB (0 = off)
Result Max Count: Delete results over N items (0 = off)
Result Max Size: Delete results over N MB (0 = off)
Result Max Days: Delete results over N days (0 = off)
Source File Missing: The source file no longer exists, so this translation cannot be continued.
Delete Record Confirm: Delete this record and all of its data (output, log and temporary files)?
No Resume Info: Not enough information to continue this translation.
Glossary Subtitle: Maintain a term mapping that's applied automatically during translation to keep proper nouns consistent.
Google API Key Hint: Used for real-time voice translation (Gemini Live).
Google key not set: Set your Google API key in Settings first.
History Subtitle: Review past translation tasks: files, languages, model and usage.
Interface hint: Click an interface to activate it · double-click to configure (API key, parameters)
Loading model: Loading model… (first run downloads it, please wait)
Local Interfaces Subtitle: Ollama / LM Studio models on this machine
Local Model Warning: Local models translate noticeably worse — quality is not guaranteed.
Local Voice Needs Plugin: Local mode needs the Audio/Video plugin (SenseVoice). Install it on the Plugins page.
Onboarding T1 Body: Start here: add a translation interface (e.g. DeepSeek), paste your API key, then click the card to activate it. Every translation uses the active interface.
Onboarding T2 Body: Type here to translate short text instantly — with voice input, read-aloud, and history. This is the default home page.
Onboarding T3 Body: Drag Word / PPT / Excel / PDF / subtitles / images into this area to translate in batch — with glossary, bilingual output, and per-format options.
Onboarding T4 Body: Press this button to translate as you speak — automatic sentence splitting, showing source and translation live.
Onboarding T5 Body: Maintain a glossary so proper nouns and key terms keep a consistent translation across every job.
Onboarding T6 Body: Install optional engines as needed: image OCR, video/audio transcription, real-time voice. A feature only activates once its plugin is installed.
Onboarding T7 Body: Pick a translation mode (precise / general) and enable placeholder protection, AI glossary extraction, translation cache and more. You're all set!
Plugin Needed For File: plugin is not installed, so this file can't be translated. Go to the Plugins page to install it?
Download Failed: Download failed — check your network and retry
Model Download Failed Hint: The library is installed, but the model download failed (likely a network issue). Restart, then re-download the model on the Plugins page.
Restart To Activate: Installed — restart the app to activate this plugin.
Update Done Restart: Update complete — please restart the app
Translation Cache Tip: Experimental. Cache finished translations so re-runs and repeated lines reuse them (zero tokens). Keyed by exact source + model/prompt/context/glossary signature; only validated translations are stored.
LaMa Inpaint Tip: Use the LaMa model to erase original text on images far more cleanly than the default (needs a ~208MB download on first enable).
Quick Translate Subtitle: Type a short text and press Enter to translate; voice input optional.
Voice Needs Plugin: Install the 翻译语音输入 plugin to use voice / read-aloud.
Enter To Translate: Enter to translate · Shift+Enter for a new line
Scanned PDF OCR Hint: OCR a scanned/image PDF before translating; slower. Plain PDFs don't need it.
Dual Alternating Hint: Original page then translated page (vs side-by-side). Only applies in bilingual mode.
Only Translated Pages Hint: Only effective when a page range is set.
Move existing models to the new location: Move existing models to the new location?
No Local Model Placeholder: No local model detected — install Ollama or enable online models in Settings
No active interface: No active interface — choose one in Interface Management
No proofread documents: No proofreadable documents found. Finish a translation first.
Per Model Hint: Set each model's API key, RPM, thread count and max retries by double-clicking its card in Interface Management; the Google realtime-voice key is there too.
Please Configure API Key First: Please configure your API key first (Settings tab)
Plugin Required: This format needs a plugin — install it on the Plugins page.
Plugins Subtitle: Install optional capability modules on demand. Restart after install to extend supported file types.
Progress Saved Hint: Progress saved. Re-upload the same file and click 'Continue Translation' to resume.
Sort by Time: Sort by completion time (click to flip newest/oldest first)
Sort by Name: Sort by name (click to flip A-Z / Z-A)
Proofread Subtitle: Review source and translation segment by segment, edit manually, then re-export.
RPM Limit (0 = unlimited, restart to app: RPM Limit (0 = unlimited, restart to apply)
Real-Time Voice Subtitle: Speak into your microphone and hear an instant spoken translation (Gemini Live).
Row count mismatch: Row count mismatch: expected {expected}, got {got}. Edits not saved.
Security Tips Content: This feature is only available in non-LAN mode. API keys are private data with security risks. Please enable with caution.
Settings Subtitle: Model keys, network and retries. For optional capability modules, see Plugins.
Translate Page Subtitle: Upload a document, subtitle, sheet or media file for one-click translation — or interpret live from your microphone, all on this page.
Unfinished Translation Detected: Unfinished translation detected — you can click 'Continue Translation'.
Up to date: You are on the latest version.
Update Prompt: A new version {version} is available (you have {current}). Open the download page?
Video ffmpeg note: Video/Audio also requires ffmpeg on your PATH.
Whisper Hint: Default is SenseVoice (zh/en/ja/ko/yue). Faster-Whisper supports many more languages but is larger and slower; the chosen model downloads on first use.
STT Scope Hint: This sets the STT model for Video/Audio subtitles only. The Real-Time Voice and Quick-Translate voice models are set on their own plugin cards.
Auto-delete by age: Auto-delete older than N days (0 = unlimited)
Clear history confirm: Clear all history? This cannot be undone.
Clear history and files confirm: Clear all history AND delete the output/log files those records produced? Your original files are kept. This cannot be undone.
LAN Mode: LAN mode (let other devices open it in a browser)
LAN access hint: When on, this device runs the web app for your LAN — others open the URL below in a browser.
Translation Options Sub: AI glossary · placeholder protection · context-aware dedup
LAN Mode Label: LAN mode (bind 0.0.0.0, takes effect after restart — other devices on the same network can access it)
LAN Admin Label: LAN admin password (with no password, ONLY this machine can change config / keys / plugins; set one to let other devices manage)
LAN Admin Placeholder: empty = only this machine can manage
Result Dir Label: Result save location (output files / real-time-voice captions)
Clear History Note: "Clear history" only removes the list; "Clear history and files" also deletes the output/log files those records produced (your original files are kept).
Model Management Sub: location · downloaded list · Video/Audio subtitle STT
Mode Picker Hint: Precise = faithful, low temperature (docs/technical/contracts, recommended); Natural = smoother; Polish = more idiomatic (with a second polish pass); Subtitle = short spoken lines for captions.
Style Guide Label: Style guide (free text, appended to the translation instruction)
Style Guide Placeholder: e.g. use Taiwan terminology; keep brand names in English
Auto Glossary Label: AI glossary extraction (auto-extract terms from the document before translating)
Context Dedup Label: Context-aware dedup (translate identical text in different positions/types separately — more accurate, more tokens)
Type Context Label: Attach type context (experimental: send each segment's type as a disambiguation hint; more tokens)
Bilingual Style Note: Only applies to bilingual translation (subtitles SRT/VTT; Word/HTML etc. coming later).
Live Stream Label: Real-time voice: stream the translation (words appear progressively; online models only)
VAD Energy: Energy (default · lowest latency · ok in noise)
VAD Silero: Silero neural (more noise-robust · downloads on first use)
Web VAD Note: Only affects Web real-time voice segmentation; Qt always uses TEN-VAD.
Hang Sensitive: Sensitive (splits on a short pause · lowest latency)
Hang Relaxed: Relaxed (for slow speech · less likely to cut off)
Hang Very Relaxed: Very relaxed (splits only after a long pause)
Hang Note: How long a pause ends a sentence. Raise it for slow speech with frequent pauses so one sentence isn't chopped into pieces (applies next time you start listening).
Sens High: High (picks up soft speech · quiet room)
MaxSeg Note: Force a split after a sentence runs this long (even with no pause), so it never runs on forever.
Translation Mode Tip: Overall preset: Precise (faithful to the source), Natural (more fluent/idiomatic), Polish (a second pass for nicer wording), Subtitle (short & spoken).
Tone Tip: How formal the translation reads — Formal is more written, Casual more conversational. Leave at Default to let the model decide.
Length Tip: Steer output length: Keep ≈ source length, Allow longer can read more naturally, Concise trims it down.
Style Guide Tip: Free-text style request added to the prompt, e.g. 'game dialogue, lively' or 'legal, formal'.
AI Glossary Extraction Tip: Before translating, let the AI pull a glossary (names, terms) from the source so the same term is rendered consistently throughout. Costs one extra AI call.
Placeholder Protection Tip: Mask placeholders/variables like %s, {name}, ${var} before translating so the model can't translate or break them.
Context-aware Dedup Tip: Translate identical text only once (keyed by type + content) to save tokens; can occasionally miss context differences.
Type Context Tip: Send each segment's type (title / body / etc.) as context to help the model decide (experimental).
Bilingual Bold Tip: In bilingual (side-by-side) output, bold the translated line so it stands out from the original.
Translation Color Tip: Color the translated text in bilingual output (only takes effect in some formats, e.g. subtitles).
Stream Translation Tip: Real-time voice: the translation appears word-by-word as it's produced instead of all at once (online models only).
Segmentation Pause Tip: How long a pause ends a sentence in live captions. Raise it for slow speech so one sentence isn't chopped into pieces.
Mic Sensitivity Tip: How loud counts as speech. High picks up soft voices (quiet room); Low only catches a loud voice (noisy room).
Force Cut Tip: Hard cap on one sentence's length — force a split after this long even with no pause, so it never runs on forever.
Auto-delete by count Tip: Keep at most this many history records; older ones are deleted automatically. 0 = unlimited.
Auto-delete by age Tip: Delete history older than this many days. 0 = unlimited.
Image OCR Model Tip: Text-recognition (OCR) model used for image translation; a larger model is more accurate but slower.
Speech-to-Text Model Tip: Speech-recognition model for video / audio / real-time voice; larger (e.g. large-v3) is more accurate but heavier on VRAM and slower.
Model Location Tip: Folder where all downloaded model files are stored.
LAN Mode Tip: When on, other people on the same network can open this machine's translator in a browser (restart to apply).
LAN admin password Tip: Password protecting admin actions (changing settings/keys) in LAN mode; leave empty to disable.
Base URL Tip: Your provider's API endpoint base, e.g. https://api.deepseek.com/v1 — usually ends in /v1.
Model ID Tip: The exact model name the provider expects, e.g. deepseek-chat or gpt-4o.
Temperature Tip: Sampling temperature: higher = more random/creative, lower = more stable and consistent (translation usually uses a low value).
Top P Tip: Nucleus sampling: limits the candidate words; lower is more conservative. Usually tuned instead of temperature, not together with it.
RPM Limit Tip: Max requests per minute (rate limit) to avoid hitting the provider's frequency cap. 0 = no limit.
Thread Count Tip: How many translation requests run in parallel. Higher is faster but more likely to hit rate limits.
Max Retries Tip: How many times to retry a segment that failed to translate before giving up.
Delete Model Confirm: Delete this model's files from disk?
No Models Hint: Expand a model type to install or remove its models.
No STT downloaded: No speech-to-text model downloaded — install one in Settings → Model Management.
Waiting for compute: Waiting for GPU/CPU (another task is running)
Context Optional: Context (optional, for disambiguation only — not translated)
Manga Mode Hint: For scanned/manga PDFs & images: group speech-bubble text, translate each bubble as one sentence, and typeset vertically. Needs the Image OCR plugin. PDF in -> PDF out.
Manga Mode PDF Hint: Fully scanned PDF (no text layer)? Turn on Manga mode. The OCR option under PDF Options is only for PDFs that contain just a few images or scanned pages.
Delete Glossary Confirm: Delete glossary "{name}"? This cannot be undone.
Support Pay Tip: Want the same combined WeChat+Alipay QR? See the guide on my homepage:
